work_unit: proactive.py CLINotifier log injection sanitize (PA-AUD-M-003 derived route-fix)
situation: audit-2026-07-08-042 finding PA-AUD-M-003: proactive.py:49 CLINotifier.notify interpolates LLM-generated message+evidence into single-line structured log without sanitization. Attacker-controlled or hallucinated LLM output containing newlines/tabs can forge extra audit trail lines, corrupt interventions.log parsers, or mask malicious activity in the audit log.
action: Added _sanitize_log_field helper that strips \n\r\t, collapses whitespace, and truncates to max_len. Applied to both message (500 chars) and evidence (300 chars) before interpolation in notify(). Worktree cp-guard triggered (opt-proactive-1783277111 had prior unmerged edits on proactive.py), so used case-104 direct-edit-in-worktree escape hatch: edited file in place within worktree, committed directly, pushed branch.
outcome_evidence: Commit aa14040 on auto/opt-proactive-1783277111 pushed to origin (59eea98..aa14040). Diff: +22/-1 lines adding _sanitize_log_field() and applying to notify(). Branch URL: https://code.alibaba-inc.com/qunbu/personal-assistant/codereview/new?from=main&to=auto/opt-proactive-1783277111
next_suggestion: 派生 L-001 (xiaozhi_server.py:234 JSON parse error silent continue — add diagnostic logging)
派生 L-002 (transcript.py:34 parse() unbounded read_text — defense-in-depth size guard)

audit_findings.finding: CLINotifier.notify log injection: LLM-generated message/evidence interpolated into single-line structured log without newline/control-char sanitization. Allows forged audit trail lines.
audit_findings.remediation: _sanitize_log_field strips \n\r\t, collapses whitespace, truncates to bounded length before interpolation.
